context.projectOverview: agent-bober — ESM/TypeScript multi-agent harness. This sprint breaks the only genuine runtime import cycle in src/fleet/: critic-deep.ts ↔ decomposer-deep.ts, via dependency injection (inject runExpandStage into runCritiqueLoop) plus relocating the Outline type to a dependency-free leaf. Pure structural refactor, zero behavior change.

principles: See .bober/principles.md — ESM everywhere with .js import specifiers, `import type` (consistent-type-imports enforced), no synchronous fs, unicode box-drawing section headers, collocated *.test.ts, conventional commits (bober(sprint-N): ...). Provider-agnostic interfaces via providers/types.ts.
toolingNote: This project has tokensave (code-graph MCP, v6.1.1) initialised. Prefer tokensave_context/tokensave_search/tokensave_callers for any code exploration before falling back to grep/Read. Use `npx vitest run` (NOT bare `vitest`, which watches). The 6 known cockpit-integration E2E MCP failures are pre-existing and unrelated — do not treat them as regressions.
